name: Pet Me Pick Me
overview: "Pet Me Pick Me" is the first-ever dating reality show where people date a partner chosen by their pet; the male participants must win the hearts of the pets of female participants in order to go on a date with the pet owner.

trailers.title: [예고] 펫미픽미에서만 볼 수 있는 단체 데이트! 점점 깊어져가는 관계 속 그들의 진심은? #펫미픽미 #petmepickme | SBSNOW
